page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG II: Angel Approaches!
text:
Is a RPG game based on Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series published by Fujimi Shobo on 23 May 1996.

This game has a book that contain the rules, character sheets, Angels and the story. It features an original story set between Episode:16 and Episode:17.

Contents

Staff

Author: Orange Jelly/Deep Sea Workshop
Text Illustrations: Hiroki Haritama
Publisher: Fujimi Shobo
Book Design: DESIGN STUDIO WIDE

Rei Ayanami

Evangelions

Evangelion Unit-00
Evangelion Unit-01
Evangelion Unit-02

Angels

Moruel (モルエル) 
新世紀エヴァンゲリオン RPG II 使徒接近! p.314 
Barsiquiel (バルシキエル) , the shape is humanoid, but with four arms. 
新世紀エヴァンゲリオン RPG II 使徒接近! p.315 
Maelstrom (ミズゲルトルウス), similar nature as Leliel. 
新世紀エヴァンゲリオン RPG II 使徒接近! p.316 
Bardiel 
新世紀エヴァンゲリオン RPG II 使徒接近! p.317 
Fozuel (フォズエル), it rotates at high speeds and shoots waves of energy. 
新世紀エヴァンゲリオン RPG II 使徒接近! p.317
